title: Hylotelephium tsugaruense
taxonomy: Hylotelephium tsugaruense is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. This plant is native to Japan and is part of the Hylotelephium genus, which is closely related to Sedum. Hylotelephium tsugaruense is a succulent plant that thrives in well-drained soil and full sun. It is often cultivated for its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. The plant's classification is further divided into its kingdom and order, which are Plantae and Saxifragales, respectively.
